verses.geez: ወሰምዑ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ገባኦን ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ኢያሪኮ ፡ ወላዕለ ፡ ጋይ ።

translations.lxx: And when the kings of the Amorites on the other side of Jordan, who were in the mountain country, and in the plain, and in all the coast of the great sea, and those who were near Antilibanus, and the Chettites, and the Chananites, and the Pherezites, and the Evites, and the Amorites, and the Gergesites, and the Jebusites, heard of it,
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when all the kings which were on this side Jordan, in the hills, and in the valleys, and in all the coasts of the great sea over against Lebanon, the Hittite, and the Amorite, the Canaanite, the Perizzite, the Hivite, and the Jebusite, heard thereof;

verses.geez:
ወገብሩ ፡ እሙንቱሂ ፡ በጕሕሉት ፡ ወመጽኡ ፡ ሠኒቆሙ ፡ ወአስተዳሊዎሙ ፡ ወጾሩ ፡ መሣንቀ ፡ ብሉየ ፡ ዲበ ፡ መታክፊሆሙ
                  ፡ ወዝቀ ፡ ወይን ፡ ብሉየ ፡ ወሥጡጠ ፡ ወጥቁበ ።

translations.lxx: There was not a word of all that Moses charged Joshua, which Joshua read not in the ears of all the assembly of the children of Israel, the men, and the women, and the children, and the strangers that joined themselves to Israel.
translations.kjv: That they gathered themselves together, to fight with Joshua and with Israel, with one accord.

verses.geez:
ወብቱክ ፡ ቶታነ ፡ አሣእኒሆሙ ፡ ወብሉይ ፡ አሥእኒሆሙ ፡ ወግቱት ፡ ውስተ ፡ እገሪሆሙ ፡ ወአልባሲሆሙኒ ፡ ብሉይ ፡
                  ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ወኅብስተ ፡ ሥንቆሙኒ ፡ ይቡስ ፡ ወሥሕቡብ ፡ ወንቁዝ ።

translations.lxx: And the inhabitants of Gabaon heard of all that the Lord did to Jericho and Gai.
translations.kjv: And when the inhabitants of Gibeon heard what Joshua had done unto Jericho and to Ai,

verses.geez:
ወመጽኡ ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንተ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እስከ ፡ ገልጋላ ፡ ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፡ እምርሑቅ ፡ ብሔር ፡ መጻእነ ፡ ወይእዜኒ ፡ ተማሐሉ ፡ ምስሌነ ።

translations.lxx: And they also wrought craftily, and they went and made provision and prepared themselves; and having taken old sacks on their shoulders, and old and rent and patched bottles of wine,
translations.kjv: They did work wilily, and went and made as if they had been ambassadors, and took old sacks upon their asses, and wine bottles, old, and rent, and bound up;

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለኮራውያን ፡ እፎ ፡ ንትማሐል ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ መሐላ ፡ ዑቁ ፡ ዮጊ ፡ ቅሩባነ ፡
                  ትነብሩ ።

translations.lxx: and the upper part of their shoes and their sandals old and clouted on their feet, and their garments old upon them—and the bread of their provision was dry and mouldy and corrupt.
translations.kjv: And old shoes and clouted upon their feet, and old garments upon them; and all the bread of their provision was dry and mouldy.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ንሕነሰ ፡ አግብርቲከ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እምአይቴ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ወእምአይቴ ፡ መጻእክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And they came to Joshua into the camp of Israel to Galgala, and said to Joshua and Israel, We are come from a far land: now then make a covenant with us.
translations.kjv: And they went to Joshua unto the camp at Gilgal, and said unto him, and to the men of Israel, We be come from a far country: now therefore make ye a league with us.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ እምነ ፡ ርሑቅ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ጥቀ ፡ መጻእነ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ አግብርቲከ ፡ በስመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ ሰማዕነ ፡ ዘበእንቲአሁ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ [በግብጻውያን ፤

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel said to the Chorrhæan, Peradventure thou dwellest amongst us; and how should I make a covenant with thee?
translations.kjv: And the men of Israel said unto the Hivites, Peradventure ye dwell among us; and how shall we make a league with you?

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡] በክልኤቱ ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ
                  ፡ ሔሴቦን ፡ ወአግ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ባሳን ፡ ዘይነብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ አስጠሮት ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ኤድራይን ።

translations.lxx: And they said to Joshua, We are thy servants: and Joshua said to them, Whence are ye, and whence have ye come?
translations.kjv: And they said unto Joshua, We are thy servants. And Joshua said unto them, Who are ye? and from whence come ye?

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ሰማዕነ ፡ ይቤሉነ ፡ ሊቃናቲነ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ብሔርነ ፡ ንሥኡ ፡ ሥንቀክሙ ፡ ለፍኖት ፡ ወሑሩ ፡
                  ተቀበልዎሙ ፡ ወበልዎሙ ፡ አግብርቲክሙ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ወይእዜኒ ፡ ተማሐሉ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ መሐላ ።

translations.lxx: And they said, Thy servants are come from a very far country in the name of the Lord thy God: for we have heard his name, and all that he did in Egypt,
translations.kjv: And they said unto him, From a very far country thy servants are come because of the name of the LORD thy God: for we have heard the fame of him, and all that he did in Egypt,

verses.geez:
ወናሁ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ኅብስትነ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ምውቅ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ነሣእናሁ ፡ እምነ ፡ አብያቲነ ፡ በዕለተ ፡ ወፃእነ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ንምጻእ ፡ ኀቤክሙ ፡ ወይእዜሰ ፡ ነቅዘ ፡ ወየብሰ ።

translations.lxx: and all that he did to the kings of the Amorites, who were beyond Jordan, to Seon king of the Amorites, and Og king of Basan, who dwelt in Astaroth and in Edrain.
translations.kjv: And all that he did to the two kings of the Amorites, that were beyond Jordan, to Sihon king of Heshbon, and to Og king of Bashan, which was at Ashtaroth.

verses.geez:
ወዝንቱኒ ፡ ዝቃተ ፡ ወይንነ ፡ [ዘ]መላእናሁ ፡ [ሐዲሰ ፡] ወይእዜሰ ፡ ዐርቀ ፡ ወበልየ ፡ ወተሠጠ ፡ ወአልባሲነሂ ፡
                  ወአሥእንነሂ ፡ በልየ ፡ እስመ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ርሑቅ ፡ ፍኖት ።

translations.lxx: And our elders and all that inhabit our land when they heard spoke to us, saying, Take to yourselves provision for the way, and go to meet them; and ye shall say to them, We are thy servants, and now make a covenant with us.
translations.kjv: Wherefore our elders and all the inhabitants of our country spake to us, saying, Take victuals with you for the journey, and go to meet them, and say unto them, We are your servants: therefore now make ye a league with us.

verses.geez: ወነሥኡ ፡ መኳንንት ፡ ሥንቆሙ ፡ ወኢተስእሉ ፡ በኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: These are the loaves—we took them hot for our journey on the day on which we came out to come to you; and now they are dried and become mouldy.
translations.kjv: This our bread we took hot for our provision out of our houses on the day we came forth to go unto you; but now, behold, it is dry, and it is mouldy:

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ሰላመ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ወተማሐለ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ያድኅኖሙ ፡ ወመሐሉ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ መላእክተ ፡
                  ተዓይን ።

translations.lxx: And these are the skins of wine which we filled when new, and they are rent; and our garments and our shoes are worn out because of the very long journey.
translations.kjv: And these bottles of wine, which we filled, were new; and, behold, they be rent: and these our garments and our shoes are become old by reason of the very long journey.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ሠሉስ ፡ መዋዕል ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ተማሐሉ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ መሐላ ፡ ሰምዑ ፡ ከመ ፡ እምቅሩብ ፡ እሙንቱ
                  ፡ ወከመ ፡ ኀቤሆሙ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ይነብሩ ።

translations.lxx: And the chiefs took of their provision, and asked not counsel of the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the men took of their victuals, and asked not counsel at the mouth of the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበጽሑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አህጉሪሆሙ ፡ አመ ፡ ሣልስት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወእላንቱ ፡ እማንቱ ፡
                  አህጉሪሆሙ ፡ ገባኦን ፡ ወ [ክ]ፊራ ፡ ወቤሮት ፡ ወአህጉረ ፡ ኢያርም ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua made peace with them, and they made a covenant with them to preserve them; and the princes of the congregation sware to them.
translations.kjv: And Joshua made peace with them, and made a league with them, to let them live: and the princes of the congregation sware unto them.

verses.geez:
ወኢተቃተልዎሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እስመ ፡ መሐሉ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ ተዓይን ፡ በእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ
                  ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወአንጐርጐሩ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ላዕለ ፡ መላእክቲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass three days after they had made a covenant with them, they heard that they were near neighbours, and that they dwelt among them.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass at the end of three days after they had made a league with them, that they heard that they were their neighbours, and that they dwelt among them.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ መላእክት ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ተዓይን ፡ ንሕነ ፡ መሐልነ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ በእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡ እስራኤል ፡
                  ወይእዜኒ ፡ ኢንክል ፡ ለኪፎቶሙ ፡ ወኢበምንትኒ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel departed and came to their cities; and their cities were Gabaon, and Kephira, and Berot, and the cities of Jarin.
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel journeyed, and came unto their cities on the third day. Now their cities were Gibeon, and Chephirah, and Beeroth, and Kirjathjearim.

verses.geez: ወከመዝ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ንገብር ፡ ናሐይዎሙ ፡ ወንቀንዮሙ ፡ ወኢይከውን ፡ ላዕሌነ ፡ መንሱት ፡ በበይነ ፡ ዘመሐልነ ፡ ሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel fought not with them, because all the princes sware to them by the Lord God of Israel; and all the congregation murmured at the princes.
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel smote them not, because the princes of the congregation had sworn unto them by the LORD God of Israel. And all the congregation murmured against the princes.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ መላእክት ፡ አሕየውናክሙ ፡ ወሤምናክሙ ፡ ትሕጥቡ ፡ ዕፀ ፡ ወትቅድሑ ፡ ማየ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ተዓይን ፡ ወከመዝ
                  ፡ አዘዝዎሙ ፡ መላአክት ።

translations.lxx: And the princes said to all the congregation: We have sworn to them by the Lord God of Israel, and now we shall not be able to touch them.
translations.kjv: But all the princes said unto all the congregation, We have sworn unto them by the LORD God of Israel: now therefore we may not touch them.

verses.geez:
ወጸውዖሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ለምንት ፡ ተሳለቅሙ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡ ወትቤሉኒ ፡ ርሑቃን ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡
                  ወናሁ ፡ አድያሚሆሙ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ምስሌነ ።

translations.lxx: This we will do; take them alive, and we will preserve them: so there shall not be wrath against us by reason of the oath which we swore to them.
translations.kjv: This we will do to them; we will even let them live, lest wrath be upon us, because of the oath which we sware unto them.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ ርጉማነ ፡ ኩኑ ፡ ኢይስዐር ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡ ገብር ፡ ዘየሐጥብ ፡ ዕፀ ፡ ወዘይቀድሕ ፡ ማየ ፡ ሊተ ፡
                  ወለአምላክየ ።

translations.lxx: They shall live, and shall be hewers of wood and drawers of water to all the congregation, as the princes said to them.
translations.kjv: And the princes said unto them, Let them live; but let them be hewers of wood and drawers of water unto all the congregation; as the princes had promised them.

verses.geez:
ወአውሥአዎ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ዜና ፡ ዜነውነ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ቍልዔሁ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  የሀብክሙዋ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወከመ ፡ ያጥፍአነ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጽክሙ ፡
                  ወ[በበይነዝ ፡] ገበርነ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ነገረ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua called them together and said to them, Why have ye deceived me, saying, We live very far from you; whereas ye are fellow-countrymen of those who dwell among us?
translations.kjv: And Joshua called for them, and he spake unto them, saying, Wherefore have ye beguiled us, saying, We are very far from you; when ye dwell among us?

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደዊክሙ ፡ ዘከመ ፡ ፈቀድክሙ ፡ ወዘከመ ፡ ይኤድመክሙ ፡ ትረስዩነ ፡ ረስዩነ ።

translations.lxx: And now ye are cursed: there shall not fail of you a slave, or a hewer of wood, or a drawer of water to me and my God.
translations.kjv: Now therefore ye are cursed, and there shall none of you be freed from being bondmen, and hewers of wood and drawers of water for the house of my God.

verses.geez: ወአድኀኖሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And they answered Joshua, saying, It was reported to us what the Lord thy God charged his servant Moses, to give you this land, and to destroy us and all that dwelt on it from before you; and we feared very much for our lives because of you, and therefore we did this thing.
translations.kjv: And they answered Joshua, and said, Because it was certainly told thy servants, how that the LORD thy God commanded his servant Moses to give you all the land, and to destroy all the inhabitants of the land from before you, therefore we were sore afraid of our lives because of you, and have done this thing.

verses.geez:
ወረሰዮሙ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ወፋርያነ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ወሐዋርያነ ፡ ማይ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ተዓይን ፡ ወለምሥዋዐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወበበይነ
                  ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ኮኑ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ገባኦን ፡ ወፋርያነ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ወሐዋርያነ ፡ ማይ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ተዓይን ፡ ወለምሥዋዐ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ እስከ ፡ ዮም ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወለመካን ፡ ዘኀርየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And now, behold, we are in your power; do to us as it is pleasing to you, and as it seems good to you.
translations.kjv: And now, behold, we are in thine hand: as it seemeth good and right unto thee to do unto us, do.
